_comment: VERIFIED external identifiers for entities (country, company, ai-lab, robotics-lab). Each Wikidata QID and English Wikipedia article was confirmed against the live Wikidata API (label, enwiki sitelink, and instance-of a sensible class (country/sovereign-state for countries; business/enterprise/public-company/organization for companies & labs)) during seeding. NEVER add an entry here without verifying it resolves to the correct real-world entity. Partial coverage is intentional: entities omitted here had no confidently-verifiable Wikidata match and emit no sameAs. Consumed by site/src/data/entities.ts -> Entity.identifiers -> JSON-LD itemReviewed.sameAs/url. Keyed by entity slug (kind=country).
_university_note: University identifiers (kind=university) were verified the same way as the groups above: each Wikidata QID was confirmed against the live Wikidata API (English label + enwiki sitelink, instance-of a university/higher-education institution) during seeding, and is keyed by the exact slug from src/data/indexes/universities.json. Partial coverage is intentional; unverifiable institutions are omitted.
